provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Law of Marriage (Specified Religions) Order.

Marriages celebrated in accordance with the rites of the religions specified in the Schedule hereto shall be lawful and the said religions are hereby declared to be specified religions for the purposes of the Law of Marriage Act. Schedule (a) Hindu Religion; (b) Bahai Religion; (c) Sikh Religion; (d) Zoroastrian Religion.
